eras.title: THE DESMOND SAGA
eras.subtitle: Where it all began. The original Assassin's Creed experience.
eras.about_html:
The Desmond Saga represents the foundation of the Assassin's Creed franchise, spanning from 2007 to 2012. This epic storyline follows Desmond Miles, a modern-day bartender who discovers his ancestral connection to legendary Assassins throughout history.

Through the revolutionary Animus technology, players experience the memories of Altaïr Ibn-La'Ahad during the Third Crusade, Ezio Auditore da Firenze through the Italian Renaissance, and Connor Kenway during the American Revolution. Each ancestor's story builds toward Desmond's ultimate destiny in preventing a global catastrophe.

This saga introduced groundbreaking parkour mechanics, social stealth gameplay, and a rich narrative that blends historical fiction with science fiction, setting the standard for the entire franchise.

eras.title: THE KENWAY SAGA
eras.subtitle: Three generations. One legendary bloodline.
eras.about_html:
The Kenway Saga spans three generations of one of the most legendary families in Assassin's Creed history. From the Golden Age of Piracy to the American Revolution, witness the rise and fall of the Kenway dynasty.

Experience Edward Kenway's transformation from ruthless pirate to Master Assassin in the Caribbean, follow Haytham Kenway's path as a Templar Grand Master, and join Connor Kenway (Ratonhnhaké:ton) in his fight for freedom during the birth of a nation.

This saga explores themes of freedom, legacy, and the blurred lines between Assassins and Templars, featuring naval combat, exploration, and some of the franchise's most memorable characters.

eras.title: EUROPEAN REVOLUTION ERA
eras.subtitle: From the streets of Paris to the heart of London.
eras.about_html:
The European Revolution Era takes players through two of history's most transformative periods: the French Revolution and the Industrial Revolution. These games showcase the franchise's evolution with enhanced parkour, cooperative gameplay, and dual protagonists.

In Unity, experience the chaos and beauty of Revolutionary Paris through Arno Dorian's quest for redemption. Then in Syndicate, command the Frye twins as they liberate Victorian London from Templar oppression during the height of the Industrial Age.

These titles introduced refined combat systems, massive crowds, detailed urban environments, and innovative gameplay mechanics that pushed the series forward while honoring its roots.

eras.title: ANCIENT TRILOGY
eras.subtitle: Witness the birth of legends in ancient worlds.
eras.about_html:
The Ancient Trilogy revolutionized the franchise with massive RPG elements, breathtaking open worlds, and stories set in humanity's most fascinating ancient civilizations. These games explore the origins of the Hidden Ones and the eternal conflict.

Journey through Ancient Egypt with Bayek, the founder of the Hidden Ones, explore the myths and legends of Ancient Greece with Kassandra or Alexios, and raid across Dark Ages England as Eivor, a legendary Viking warrior.

Featuring enhanced combat systems, dialogue choices, massive worlds to explore, and deep RPG mechanics, the Ancient Trilogy redefined what an Assassin's Creed game could be.

eras.title: MODERN CLASSIC RETURN
eras.subtitle: A return to the roots with modern innovation.
eras.about_html:
The Modern Classic Return represents the franchise's evolution as it honors its stealth-focused origins while embracing modern gameplay innovations. These titles mark a new chapter that balances classic Assassin's Creed gameplay with contemporary design.

Experience Basim's transformation from street thief to Master Assassin in the Golden Age of Baghdad, then journey to Feudal Japan with dual protagonists Yasuke and Naoe, combining brute force with deadly precision in one of gaming's most requested settings.

These games showcase refined parkour, focused narratives, and a return to the social stealth and assassination gameplay that defined the early franchise, while incorporating lessons learned from the RPG trilogy.

assassins.card_desc: The legendary Syrian Assassin who reformed the Brotherhood. After his arrogance led to failure, Altaïr redeemed himself and revolutionized the Creed, creating the foundation for future generations.

The most celebrated Assassin in history. Born into nobility, Ezio's life changed when his family was betrayed. He became a Master Assassin, rebuilt the Brotherhood, and discovered the secrets of the First Civilization.
Driven by guilt over the death of his adoptive father, Arno joined the Parisian Brotherhood to seek redemption. His journey intertwined with Élise, a Templar, challenging his loyalties.
A half-Mohawk, half-British Master Assassin who fought to protect his people's land during the American Revolutionary War. He played a pivotal role in the nation's founding.
A reckless privateer-turned-pirate who stumbled into the Assassin-Templar conflict. Edward sought wealth but found purpose, eventually becoming an Assassin and father to a legendary lineage.

The last Medjay of Egypt. Following a devastating personal tragedy, Bayek's quest for vengeance alongside his wife Aya led to the foundation of the Hidden Ones, the precursors to the Assassin Brotherhood.

A fierce Viking shieldmaiden who led their clan from Norway to England. While not officially Hidden Ones, Eivor wielded a Hidden Blade and aided the Brotherhood in eradicating the Order of the Ancients.

The legendary Eagle Bearer of Sparta and wielder of the Spear of Leonidas. As a Misthios, Kassandra fought the Cult of Kosmos and became the Keeper of the Staff of Hermes Trismegistus, living for millennia.
A street thief from Baghdad who rose to become a Master Assassin. Basim's journey is one of tragedy and revelation, as he uncovers his true nature and past life within the Isu.
An Assassin turned Templar out of disillusionment with the Brotherhood's reckless pursuit of Isu artifacts. He became a deadly Assassin hunter in the American colonies and North Atlantic.
A brawling Master Assassin who co-founded the Rooks street gang to dismantle Templar control over Industrial Revolution London. Brash and aggressive, he preferred action over planning.
The more calculated Frye twin, a Master of Stealth who focused on securing Pieces of Eden from Templar hands while her brother waged gang war. A true scholar of the Creed.

ac1.card_desc: The journey begins with Altaïr Ibn-La'Ahad during the Third Crusade and the awakening of Desmond Miles.
ac1.title: Assassin's Creed (2007)
ac1.story_desc: Step into the robes of Altaïr Ibn-La'Ahad, a master assassin during the Third Crusade. The first title in the Assassin's Creed series laid the foundation for stealth, parkour, and historical fiction in modern gaming. With an innovative open world, unique free-running mechanics, and the introduction of Desmond Miles, this game began a legendary journey.
ac1.story_highlights:
• Explore three major cities: Jerusalem, Acre, and Damascus
  • Uncover the conspiracy behind the Templar Order
  • Experience the dual narrative of Altaïr and Desmond Miles
  • Discover the ancient conflict between Assassins and Templars

features.title: Free-Running Parkour
features.desc: Climb rooftops and leap across ancient cities fluidly.

features.title: Social Stealth
features.desc: Blend with crowds and vanish in plain sight.

features.title: Historical Narrative
features.desc: A thrilling plot that fuses real history with sci-fi intrigue.

mechanics.title: Assassination Techniques
mechanics.desc:
Master the art of silent kills with the iconic hidden blade. Plan your approach, blend with
                        scholars, and strike from the shadows to eliminate your targets without detection.

mechanics.title: Investigation & Intel
mechanics.desc:
Gather information through eavesdropping, pickpocketing, and interrogation. Each assassination
                        requires careful planning and reconnaissance before the strike.

ac1.legacy_html:
Assassin's Creed revolutionized open-world gaming with its innovative parkour system and historical storytelling. The game introduced the Animus concept, blending modern-day and historical narratives in a way never seen before. Its success spawned one of gaming's most beloved franchises, influencing countless action-adventure titles.

Best Action Game 2007
IGN Game of the Year Nominee
Over 8 Million Copies Sold
ac1.cta_subtitle: Relive the origin of the Brotherhood in the game that started it all.

ac2.card_desc: Enter the Italian Renaissance and meet Ezio Auditore da Firenze on his quest for justice and vengeance.
ac2.title: Assassin's Creed II (2009)
ac2.story_desc: Enter the Italian Renaissance as Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a young nobleman turned Assassin after tragedy strikes his family. Assassin's Creed II refined every aspect of its predecessor, offering a deeper story, new gameplay mechanics, and memorable cities like Florence and Venice. It marked the beginning of one of gaming’s most iconic heroes.

features.title: Weapon Variety
features.desc: From dual hidden blades to smoke bombs, new tools expand your strategy.

features.title: Renaissance Art & Design
features.desc: Explore beautifully recreated cities like Florence, Venice, and Tuscany.

features.title: Cryptic Truths
features.desc: Uncover glyph puzzles and secret messages left behind by ancient Assassins.

mechanics.title: Economic System
mechanics.desc: Invest in Monteriggioni, your family's villa. Renovate shops, upgrade defenses, and collect art to increase your income and unlock new equipment.

mechanics.title: Leonardo's Inventions
mechanics.desc: Collaborate with Leonardo da Vinci to decode Codex pages and unlock powerful weapons like the hidden gun, poison blade, and flying machine.

ac2.legacy_html:
Assassin's Creed II is widely regarded as one of the greatest games of all time. It perfected the formula established by its predecessor and introduced Ezio Auditore, who became the face of the franchise. The game's emotional storytelling, stunning Renaissance setting, and refined gameplay mechanics set a new standard for the series.

Game of the Year 2009
Metacritic Score: 91/100
Fan Favorite Character
ac2.cta_subtitle: Discover secrets, master your skills, and become the legend of Florence and Venice.

brotherhood.card_desc: Ezio leads the Brotherhood in Rome, expanding the Assassin Order and continuing the war against the Borgia family.
brotherhood.title: Assassin's Creed: Brotherhood (2010)
brotherhood.story_desc: Continuing Ezio’s journey, Assassin's Creed: Brotherhood expands the story to Rome where Ezio must rebuild the Assassin Brotherhood. The game introduced the iconic Brotherhood system, allowing players to recruit and train fellow assassins. It also marked the franchise’s first foray into online multiplayer.

features.title: Brotherhood System
features.desc: Recruit, train, and call on fellow assassins to aid you in battle.

features.title: Rome Reborn
features.desc: Help liberate and restore the city by investing in shops, landmarks, and guilds.

features.title: Multiplayer Debut
features.desc: Engage in tense cat-and-mouse multiplayer with unique characters and playstyles.

mechanics.title: Assassin Recruitment
mechanics.desc: Save citizens from guards and recruit them into your Brotherhood. Train them through missions and call upon them in combat for devastating chain kills.

mechanics.title: Borgia Towers
mechanics.desc: Liberate districts by assassinating Borgia captains and burning their towers. Restore Rome's economy and unlock new shops and services.

brotherhood.legacy_html:
Brotherhood proved that direct sequels could expand and improve upon their predecessors. The Brotherhood recruitment system became a franchise staple, and the multiplayer mode introduced innovative cat-and-mouse gameplay that stood out in the action genre. Rome's single massive city showcased the series' attention to historical detail.

Best Action Game 2010
Metacritic Score: 89/100
Innovative Multiplayer
brotherhood.cta_subtitle: Take Rome back, command your allies, and defeat the tyrannical Borgia family.

revelations.card_desc: Ezio follows in Altair's footsteps to unlock secrets buried in Constantinople, concluding both legends' stories.
revelations.title: Assassin's Creed: Revelations (2011)
revelations.story_desc: Assassin's Creed: Revelations closes the legendary tale of Ezio Auditore. Journey to Constantinople to uncover the secrets of Altaïr’s legacy. New tools like the Hookblade, bomb crafting, and tower defense gameplay bring fresh dynamics. Experience both Ezio’s and Altaïr’s intertwined destinies in a moving finale.

features.title: Hookblade
features.desc: Speed through Constantinople and scale buildings faster with the new assassin tool.

features.title: Bomb Crafting
features.desc: Create tactical bombs from over 300 combinations to suit any situation.

features.title: Legacy of Altaïr
features.desc: Live through the memories of Altaïr and uncover the secrets of the ancient Brotherhood.

mechanics.title: Bomb Crafting System
mechanics.desc:
Create custom bombs from over 300 combinations. Mix shells, gunpowder, and effects to create
                        lethal, tactical, or diversionary explosives tailored to your playstyle.

mechanics.title: Hookblade Traversal
mechanics.desc:
Use the hookblade to zip across lines, extend your reach, and navigate Constantinople faster than
                        ever. Perfect for quick escapes and dynamic parkour sequences.

revelations.legacy_html:
Revelations provided a fitting conclusion to Ezio's story while honoring Altaïr's legacy. The emotional depth of seeing both assassins in their final years resonated with fans. The game's exploration of Constantinople and its rich Ottoman culture added a fresh setting to the series, while the bomb crafting system offered unprecedented tactical freedom.

Emotional Conclusion
Metacritic Score: 80/100
Two Legendary Stories
revelations.cta_subtitle: Conclude Ezio’s journey and discover the hidden truths of the Creed.

ac3.card_desc: As the American Revolution rages, Desmond learns his ultimate role through the story of Connor Kenway.
ac3.title: Assassin's Creed III (2012)
ac3.story_desc: Assassin's Creed III introduces Connor Kenway, a half-Mohawk assassin fighting for freedom during the American Revolution. Navigate battlefields, scale forests, and influence a nation's birth. With a revamped engine and combat, AC3 redefined the series with epic scope and emotional storytelling.
ac3.story_highlights:
• Experience Connor's journey from childhood to Master Assassin
  • Participate in iconic battles like Bunker Hill and Lexington
  • Navigate the complex relationship between Connor and Haytham
  • Witness the conclusion of Desmond's modern-day story

features.title: Frontier Exploration
features.desc: Traverse vast forests, scale cliffs, and hunt wildlife in the dynamic American frontier.

features.title: Naval Combat
features.desc: Command your own ship and engage in thrilling sea battles that changed the tide of war.

features.title: Historical Figures
features.desc: Meet George Washington, Benjamin Franklin, and others as you shape history's path.

mechanics.title: Frontier & Hunting
mechanics.desc: Explore the vast American wilderness. Hunt animals for resources, discover hidden locations, and experience dynamic weather and seasons that affect gameplay.

mechanics.title: Revamped Combat
mechanics.desc: Experience fluid, brutal combat with dual-wielding weapons, environmental kills, and the iconic tomahawk. Chain kills and counter attacks feel more visceral than ever.

ac3.legacy_html:
Assassin's Creed III concluded Desmond's story while introducing a bold new setting and protagonist. The game's ambitious scope, featuring massive battles, naval combat, and a sprawling frontier, pushed the series forward. Connor's journey through the American Revolution offered a unique perspective on history, and the naval gameplay laid the groundwork for Black Flag's success.

Best of E3 2012
12+ Million Copies Sold
Revolutionary Naval Combat
ac3.cta_subtitle: Shape the American Revolution and forge a new creed with Connor.

blackflag.card_desc: Set during the Golden Age of Piracy, follow Edward Kenway as he sails the Caribbean and blurs the line between pirate and Assassin.
blackflag.title: Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag (2013)

info.platforms: PC, PS3, PS4, Xbox 360, Xbox One

blackflag.story_desc: Set sail as Edward Kenway, a reckless pirate captain with the skills of an Assassin. Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag blends naval combat, exploration, and classic stealth action in a lush open-world Caribbean. Become a legend of the seas during the Golden Age of Piracy.
blackflag.story_highlights:
• Experience Edward's transformation from pirate to Assassin
  • Explore the vast Caribbean with over 50 unique locations
  • Meet legendary pirates like Blackbeard and Anne Bonny
  • Command the Jackdaw in epic naval battles

features.title: Open-Sea Exploration
features.desc: Navigate the Caribbean, engage enemy ships, and uncover hidden islands.

features.title: Naval Combat
features.desc: Upgrade the Jackdaw and engage in thrilling ship-to-ship battles.

features.title: Dual Identity
features.desc: Live both as a pirate and an Assassin in a dynamic, morally gray world.

mechanics.title: Naval Warfare
mechanics.desc: Command the Jackdaw in intense ship battles. Upgrade your vessel with mortars, swivel guns, and heavy shot. Board enemy ships and claim their cargo in the ultimate pirate experience.

mechanics.title: Open World Exploration
mechanics.desc: Discover hidden coves, underwater shipwrecks, and Mayan ruins. Hunt whales and sharks, dive for treasure, and build your pirate fleet across the Caribbean.

blackflag.legacy_html:
Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag is widely considered one of the best entries in the franchise. Its revolutionary naval combat system, vast open-world Caribbean, and compelling pirate narrative captivated players worldwide. Edward Kenway's journey from selfish pirate to noble Assassin resonated deeply, while the game's sea shanties became iconic. Black Flag proved that the series could successfully explore new time periods and gameplay styles.

Game of the Year 2013
Best Naval Combat
Iconic Sea Shanties
blackflag.cta_subtitle: Board the Jackdaw, fight for freedom, and forge your legend as the most feared pirate Assassin of all time.

rogue.card_desc: Experience the Assassin-Templar conflict from the other side through the story of Shay Cormac, a former Assassin turned Templar.
rogue.title: Assassin's Creed: Rogue (2014)
rogue.story_desc: Play as Shay Patrick Cormac, a former Assassin turned Templar, in a story of betrayal, ideology, and loyalty. Assassin's Creed: Rogue delivers a fresh perspective, showing the conflict through the eyes of a Templar while exploring the icy North Atlantic and vibrant River Valley.
rogue.story_highlights:
• Experience the Assassin-Templar war from the Templar perspective
  • Witness Shay's transformation from Assassin to Templar hunter
  • Connect the stories of AC3, Black Flag, and Unity
  • Navigate the frozen North Atlantic and River Valley

features.title: Templar Perspective
features.desc: Experience the Assassin-Templar conflict from the other side.

features.title: Naval Combat Returns
features.desc: Command your ship, the Morrigan, in Arctic naval battles.

features.title: Icy Exploration
features.desc: Traverse the frozen North Atlantic and hidden River Valley settlements.

mechanics.title: Templar Hunter
mechanics.desc: Hunt down Assassins using new weapons like the air rifle and grenade launcher. Experience being stalked by Assassins in a thrilling role reversal that adds tension to every mission.

mechanics.title: Arctic Naval Combat
mechanics.desc: Navigate treacherous icebergs and frozen waters aboard the Morrigan. Use new tactics like oil slicks and burning oil to defeat enemies in harsh Arctic conditions.

rogue.legacy_html:
Assassin's Creed Rogue offered a unique perspective by letting players experience the conflict from the Templar side. Shay's moral journey and the game's darker tone provided fresh insight into the franchise's central conflict. The Arctic setting and improved naval mechanics built upon Black Flag's foundation, while the story directly connected to both AC3 and Unity, making it essential for understanding the Kenway saga.

Unique Perspective
Story Bridge
Arctic Innovation
rogue.cta_subtitle: Challenge your ideals, shape history, and embrace a darker legacy.

unity.card_desc: Set during the French Revolution, join Arno Dorian as he navigates political unrest and personal redemption in Paris.
unity.title: Assassin's Creed: Unity (2014)
unity.story_desc: Arno Dorian seeks redemption during the French Revolution in a city boiling with chaos. Assassin's Creed: Unity introduced cooperative gameplay, breathtaking parkour mechanics, and stunningly recreated Parisian landmarks. From Notre-Dame to the Bastille, join a tale of betrayal, justice, and revolution.
unity.story_highlights:
• Experience Arno's quest for redemption and justice
  • Witness the French Revolution's most pivotal moments
  • Explore a meticulously recreated 18th-century Paris
  • Uncover the conspiracy behind Arno's father's death

features.title: 4-Player Co-Op
features.desc: Team up with friends in Brotherhood missions across Paris.

features.title: Historic Paris
features.desc: Scale Notre-Dame, blend into crowds, and witness the Revolution firsthand.

features.title: Fluid Parkour
features.desc: New animations make climbing, descending, and leaping more intuitive than ever.

mechanics.title: Cooperative Missions
mechanics.desc: Team up with up to 3 friends in dedicated co-op missions. Coordinate assassinations, heists, and infiltrations across Paris with unique character customization.

mechanics.title: Advanced Parkour
mechanics.desc: Experience the most fluid parkour system yet with controlled descent, seamless climbing, and contextual animations that make navigating Paris feel natural.

unity.legacy_html:
Assassin's Creed Unity pushed the boundaries of the franchise with its stunning recreation of Revolutionary Paris and innovative cooperative gameplay. Despite a rocky launch, the game's attention to historical detail, improved parkour system, and deep customization options earned it a dedicated fanbase. The game's portrayal of Notre-Dame became especially poignant after the 2019 fire.

Best Co-Op Experience
Most Detailed City
Iconic Notre-Dame
unity.cta_subtitle: Wield the blade of justice and write history amidst the chaos of Revolution.

syndicate.card_desc: In Industrial London, lead the Frye twins — Jacob and Evie — as they battle Templar control in the heart of the Empire.
syndicate.title: Assassin's Creed: Syndicate (2015)
syndicate.story_desc: Set in the heart of the Industrial Revolution, Assassin's Creed: Syndicate lets you play as twin Assassins Jacob and Evie Frye. Liberate London from the grip of oppression and corruption using new tools, gangs, and street smarts. Syndicate brought a gritty, fast-paced edge to the franchise.
syndicate.story_highlights:
• Play as both Jacob and Evie Frye with unique abilities
  • Build and lead the Rooks gang to control London
  • Meet historical figures like Charles Darwin and Karl Marx
  • Liberate London's boroughs from Templar control

features.title: Twin Protagonists
features.desc: Switch between Jacob's brawling and Evie’s stealthy tactics on the fly.

features.title: Vehicles & Grapple
features.desc: Use carriages, trains, and a new grappling hook to navigate Victorian London.

features.title: Gang Wars
features.desc: Lead the Rooks and take down rival gangs to claim control over the city.

mechanics.title: Rope Launcher
mechanics.desc: Traverse Victorian London with the revolutionary rope launcher. Zip across rooftops, create ziplines, and reach new heights faster than ever before.

mechanics.title: Gang Leadership
mechanics.desc: Build and command the Rooks gang. Recruit members, conquer territories, and engage in epic street fights to liberate London from Templar control.

syndicate.legacy_html:
Assassin's Creed Syndicate brought the franchise to Victorian London with style and innovation. The twin protagonists offered diverse gameplay approaches, while the rope launcher revolutionized traversal. The game's portrayal of the Industrial Revolution, combined with appearances by historical figures like Charles Darwin and Alexander Graham Bell, created a memorable adventure through one of history's most transformative periods.

Best Dual Protagonists
Innovative Traversal
Industrial Revolution Era
syndicate.cta_subtitle: Lead the revolution and free the streets from the shadows of the Templars.

origins.card_desc: Discover the roots of the Brotherhood with Bayek in a stunning recreation of Ancient Egypt during Cleopatra's rise to power.
origins.title: Assassin's Creed: Origins (2017)
origins.story_desc: Assassin's Creed: Origins takes players to Ancient Egypt, where the journey of Bayek of Siwa gives rise to the Assassin Brotherhood. Discover a rich open world, RPG elements, and a new combat system that reshaped the franchise.
origins.story_highlights:
• Witness the birth of the Assassin Brotherhood
  • Explore the vast deserts and cities of Ancient Egypt
  • Experience Bayek and Aya's quest for vengeance
  • Encounter Cleopatra and Julius Caesar

features.title: Revolutionized Combat
features.desc: Engage in action-RPG combat with customizable gear and abilities.

features.title: Massive Open World
features.desc: Explore deserts, cities, pyramids, and the Nile in stunning detail.

features.title: Senu the Eagle
features.desc: Use your eagle companion Senu to scout, tag enemies, and explore from above.

mechanics.title: RPG Combat System
mechanics.desc:
Experience a completely revamped combat system with hitbox-based attacks, dodging, and parrying.
                        Level up, customize your gear, and unlock powerful abilities in this action-RPG transformation.

mechanics.title: Senu the Eagle
mechanics.desc:
Use your eagle companion to scout locations, mark enemies, and discover secrets from above. Senu
                        revolutionized reconnaissance in the franchise.

origins.legacy_html:
Assassin's Creed Origins marked a bold new direction for the franchise, introducing RPG mechanics, a revamped combat system, and a massive open world. Set in stunning Ancient Egypt, the game told the origin story of the Brotherhood while modernizing gameplay for a new era. Its success paved the way for Odyssey and Valhalla, establishing the "Ancient Trilogy" formula.

Franchise Reinvention
Best Setting 2017
RPG Transformation
origins.cta_subtitle: Uncover the secrets of Ancient Egypt and the hidden history behind the Brotherhood.

odyssey.card_desc: Choose your destiny as Kassandra or Alexios and shape the fate of Ancient Greece during the Peloponnesian War.
odyssey.title: Assassin's Creed: Odyssey (2018)
odyssey.story_desc: In Assassin's Creed: Odyssey, embark on an epic journey through ancient Greece during the Peloponnesian War. Choose your path as either Alexios or Kassandra, uncover your Spartan heritage, and shape history through your choices in this RPG-style adventure.
odyssey.story_highlights:
• Choose between Alexios or Kassandra as your protagonist
  • Make choices that impact the story and world
  • Explore ancient Greece from Athens to Sparta
  • Uncover the secrets of the First Civilization

features.title: Player Choice
features.desc: Choose your hero, shape your story, and make decisions that alter the game world.

features.title: Ancient Greece
features.desc: Explore a stunning open world filled with historic landmarks, cities, and mythology.

features.title: Naval Combat
features.desc: Return to the seas and battle across the Aegean with upgradable ships and crew.

mechanics.title: Dialogue Choices
mechanics.desc: Shape your story through meaningful dialogue choices that affect relationships, quests, and endings. Your decisions have lasting consequences throughout the game.

mechanics.title: Naval Exploration
mechanics.desc: Command your ship, the Adrestia, across the Aegean Sea. Engage in naval combat, recruit legendary lieutenants, and discover hidden islands.

odyssey.legacy_html:
Assassin's Creed Odyssey expanded on Origins' RPG foundation with deeper choice-driven gameplay and branching narratives. Set in the stunning world of Ancient Greece, it offered unprecedented player agency and one of the largest maps in the series. The game's mythological elements and engaging characters made it a fan favorite in the Ancient Trilogy.

Best RPG Elements
Player Choice Pioneer
Massive Open World
odyssey.cta_subtitle: Dive into ancient history and fight for your destiny.

valhalla.card_desc: Become Eivor, a fierce Viking raider, and forge your legacy across England in a sprawling open-world saga of conquest and myth.
valhalla.title: Assassin's Creed: Valhalla (2020)

info.platforms: PC, PS4, PS5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X/S

valhalla.story_desc: Assassin's Creed: Valhalla casts you as Eivor, a fierce Viking raider on a quest for glory in 9th-century England. Lead your clan from icy Norway to a new home in lush lands, engage in brutal battles, and forge alliances to establish your kingdom.
valhalla.story_highlights:
• Lead your Viking clan from Norway to England
  • Build and upgrade your settlement, Ravensthorpe
  • Forge alliances with Saxon kingdoms
  • Uncover the mysteries of the Hidden Ones and Order of Ancients

features.title: Settlement Building
features.desc: Create and upgrade your Viking settlement as a central hub for your adventures.

features.title: Raiding & Alliances
features.desc: Lead raids, conquer lands, and form political alliances to expand your influence.

features.title: Myth & History
features.desc: Encounter Norse gods, legendary beasts, and historical figures on your journey.

mechanics.title: Settlement Management
mechanics.desc:
Build and customize your Viking settlement, Ravensthorpe. Construct buildings, recruit new clan
                        members, and unlock services that enhance your gameplay experience.

mechanics.title: Raids & Conquest
mechanics.desc:
Lead brutal Viking raids on monasteries and fortresses. Gather resources, expand your influence,
                        and conquer territories across England with your crew.

valhalla.legacy_html:
Assassin's Creed Valhalla brought the Ancient Trilogy to a climactic conclusion with its Viking setting and settlement-building mechanics. The game's massive world, spanning England and Norway, combined with its deep narrative connections to the series' mythology, made it one of the most ambitious entries. Valhalla's post-launch support with expansions set new standards for the franchise.

Best-Selling AC Game
Epic Viking Saga
Settlement Innovation
valhalla.cta_subtitle: Sail to new worlds, raid, rule, and uncover your destiny in Valhalla.

mirage.card_desc: Return to the franchise's stealth roots with Basim navigating the dense streets of 9th-century Baghdad, uncovering secrets in the shadows.
mirage.title: Assassin's Creed: Mirage (2023)
mirage.story_desc: In Assassin's Creed: Mirage, experience the origins of the Assassins in 9th-century Baghdad. Play as Basim, a skilled thief turned assassin, navigating a vibrant city filled with intrigue, stealth, and ancient secrets.
mirage.story_highlights:
• Discover Basim's transformation from street thief to Hidden One
  • Explore the Golden Age of Baghdad with stunning detail
  • Uncover the secrets of the ancient Order
  • Experience classic stealth-focused gameplay

features.title: Stealth Gameplay
features.desc: Master stealth mechanics as you blend into crowds and strike unseen.

features.title: Historic Baghdad
features.desc: Explore a richly detailed open world city during the Islamic Golden Age.

features.title: Fast-Paced Action
features.desc: Engage in fluid combat and dynamic parkour through narrow streets and rooftops.

mechanics.title: Classic Stealth
mechanics.desc: Return to the roots with refined stealth mechanics. Use social stealth, blend into crowds, and execute silent assassinations like the original games.

mechanics.title: Dense Urban Exploration
mechanics.desc: Navigate the bustling streets and rooftops of Baghdad. Discover hidden secrets, complete contracts, and immerse yourself in the Islamic Golden Age.

mirage.legacy_html:
Assassin's Creed Mirage marks a return to the series' roots, focusing on stealth, parkour, and a tightly crafted narrative. Set in the vibrant city of Baghdad during the Islamic Golden Age, it pays homage to the original game while introducing modern refinements. Basim's story bridges past and future, connecting to the larger AC universe.

Back to Basics Approach

mirage.cta_subtitle: Step into the dawn of the Assassins and rewrite history.

shadows.card_desc: Step into feudal Japan, where dual protagonists—Yasuke and Naoe—merge power and stealth in an epic tale of honor, rebellion, and loyalty.
shadows.title: Assassin's Creed: Shadows (2024)
shadows.story_desc: Assassin's Creed: Shadows transports players to war-torn feudal Japan. Experience dual protagonists — the stealthy assassin Naoe and the powerful samurai Yasuke — as they fight through political strife, epic landscapes, and evolving loyalties in one of the franchise's most immersive worlds.
shadows.story_highlights:
• Play as both Naoe the Shinobi and Yasuke the Samurai
  • Experience two distinct playstyles: stealth and combat
  • Explore feudal Japan during the Sengoku period
  • Navigate political intrigue and clan warfare

features.title: Stealth & Combat Blend
features.desc: Master both silent assassinations and powerful katana strikes with two distinct styles.

features.title: Feudal Japan
features.desc: Roam ancient castles, villages, and bamboo forests as political chaos unfolds.

features.title: Dual Protagonists
features.desc: Play as both Naoe the Shinobi and Yasuke the Samurai in a revolutionary narrative.

mechanics.title: Dual Protagonist System
mechanics.desc: Switch between Naoe's stealth-focused gameplay and Yasuke's powerful combat style. Each character offers unique abilities, weapons, and approaches to missions.

mechanics.title: Dynamic Seasons
mechanics.desc: Experience Japan's beauty across changing seasons. Weather and time of day affect stealth, combat, and exploration in this living, breathing world.

shadows.legacy_html:
Assassin's Creed Shadows represents the franchise's long-awaited journey to feudal Japan. With dual protagonists offering contrasting playstyles, the game promises to deliver both the stealth gameplay fans love and intense samurai combat. The setting during the Sengoku period provides a rich backdrop of political intrigue, honor, and warfare.

Most Anticipated 2025
Revolutionary Dual System
Fan-Requested Setting
shadows.cta_subtitle: Unleash the power of stealth and honor in feudal Japan.
